name: MySQL REST Service (MRS) API
description: The MySQL REST Service (MRS) provides a RESTful interface to MySQL databases. It exposes database tables, views, and stored procedures as REST endpoints with CRUD operations, flexible querying (filtering, pagination, sorting), optimistic concurrency control via ETags, and multiple authentication methods including MySQL Internal, SCRAM, and OAuth2.
